title: MCP Voice Status Tools
description: MCP tool definitions for the Voice Status Server

tools.name: register_callsign
tools.description: Register an agent call sign for spoken status messages. Call signs identify who is speaking and must be registered before using speak_status. Call signs are alphanumeric with optional hyphens, 1-20 characters.

callSign.description: The call sign to register (e.g., 'Copilot', 'Claude', 'Agent-7'). Must be alphanumeric with optional hyphens, 1-20 characters.

previousCallSign.description: The previous call sign if one was replaced

tools.name: speak_status
tools.description: Speak a short status message using Windows text-to-speech. Messages are prefixed with the registered call sign and status phase. Rate limiting and deduplication are applied automatically to prevent audio spam.

phase.description: Status phase category: 'confirm' (acknowledge receipt), 'waiting' (blocked/waiting state), 'blocked' (external dependency blocking), 'done' (successful completion), 'error' (failure/exception)

message.description: The message content to speak. Should be 1-2 sentences maximum, factual and concise.

callSign.description: Optional call sign override. If not provided, uses the registered call sign.

spoken.description: Whether the message was actually spoken

skippedReason.description: If not spoken, the reason why

cooldownMs.description: Remaining cooldown in milliseconds (if rate limited)

spokenText.description: The full text that was spoken (for debugging)

output.spokenText: Copilot: error. Failed to connect to database.

NO_CALLSIGN.description: No call sign registered. Call register_callsign first.

INVALID_CALLSIGN.description: Call sign does not match required pattern (alphanumeric with hyphens, 1-20 chars)

INVALID_PHASE.description: Phase is not one of: confirm, waiting, blocked, done, error

INVALID_MESSAGE.description: Message is empty, too long (>200 chars), or contains only whitespace

TTS_FAILED.description: Windows text-to-speech failed. Check that audio output is available.
